releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Compatible with Initiative Tracker and Fantasy Statblocks

## What's Changed
* Initiative tracker by @Skallaturi in https://github.com/Skallaturi/hephaistos-importer/pull/13
* changed icon from hammer to anvil by @Skallaturi in https://github.com/Skallaturi/hephaistos-importer/pull/14
* Statblock by @Skallaturi in https://github.com/Skallaturi/hephaistos-importer/pull/15
* use subheadings for links by @Skallaturi in https://github.com/Skallaturi/hephaistos-importer/pull/16
* remove empty array entries by @Skallaturi in https://github.com/Skallaturi/hephaistos-importer/pull/17
* add links to descriptions by @Skallaturi in https://github.com/Skallaturi/hephaistos-importer/pull/18
* ready for 2.1.0 by @Skallaturi in https://github.com/Skallaturi/hephaistos-importer/pull/19


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Skallaturi/hephaistos-importer/compare/2.0.1...2.1.0
